explanation: For \(\sqrt{x-3}\) to be defined, \( x - 3 \geq 0 \Rightarrow x \geq 3 \)
name: Domain of Square Root

text: If \( f(x) = x^2 + 1 \) and \( g(x) = \sqrt{x} \), then \( f(g(x)) = \)
name: Composite Function

text: A function \( f: A \to B \) is bijective if it is:
name: Bijective Function Definition

text: The range of \( f(x) = \sin x \) is:
explanation: The sine function always outputs values in \([-1, 1]\).
name: Range of Sine

explanation: \( f(f(x)) = \frac{\frac{x+1}{x-1}+1}{\frac{x+1}{x-1}-1} = \frac{2x}{2} = x \). So \(f\) is its own inverse.
name: Function Composed with Itself

explanation: \( f(-x) = |-x| = |x| = f(x) \). So \(f\) is an even function.
name: Even or Odd Function

text: The domain of \( f(x) = \log(x^2 - x - 6) \) is:
name: Domain of Logarithm

text: Number of functions from a set of 3 elements to a set of 2 elements is:
explanation: Each of 3 elements can map to 2 choices. Total \( = 2^3 = 8 \)
name: Number of Functions

text: If \( f(x) = x^3 \), then \( f \) is:
explanation: \( f(-x) = (-x)^3 = -x^3 = -f(x) \). So \(f\) is an odd function.
name: Odd Function Check

text: The period of \( f(x) = \tan x \) is:
explanation: \( \tan(x+\pi) = \tan x \) for all \(x\). The period is \(\pi\).
name: Period of Tangent

text: The function \( f: \mathbb{R} \to \mathbb{R} \) defined by \( f(x) = x^2 \) is:
explanation: Not injective (\(f(2)=f(-2)\)), not surjective (negative reals have no pre-image).
name: Injectivity and Surjectivity

text: If \( f(x+y) = f(x) + f(y) \) for all \(x, y\) and \(f(1) = 3\), then \(f(5) = \)
explanation: This is Cauchy's functional equation: \( f(x) = kx \). \( f(1)=3 \Rightarrow k=3 \). So \( f(5) = 15 \)
name: Cauchy Functional Equation
